description: Baseline fixture registry — check this first before creating new test files. Add more entries as needed.

PhilippineNationalID.baseline: gs://qa-automation-dev/identity_kyc/PhilippineNationalID/National ID_00001- Identification System ID - VICTOR CASTAÑEDA CAPITULO.jpg
PhilippineNationalID.notes: Baseline PhilID — use for standard parse tests

Payslip.notes: Partial payslip — some fields may be missing. Use PS-013.pdf for complete payslip tests

fixture_creation_rules.step_1: Check fixture-registry.json first — use existing baseline if it satisfies the scenario
fixture_creation_rules.step_2: Check gs://qa-automation-dev/** and gs://verifyiq-internal-testing/QA/** for additional fixtures
fixture_creation_rules.step_3: If no suitable fixture exists — create synthetic file using Python (Pillow, qrcode, reportlab)
fixture_creation_rules.step_5: Add new fixture to fixture-registry.json and commit
